metadata.description: Marketplace for llbbl Claude Code plugins and skills

plugins.name: upkeep
plugins.description: Security audits, dependency upgrades, and quality scoring for JS/TS repos. Bundles the /upkeep:audit, /upkeep:deps, and /upkeep:quality skills.

plugins.name: esm
plugins.description: Development workflows for llbbl/esm and integration guidance for adopting the PHP enum-state-machine library.

plugins.name: uncov
plugins.description: Adoption and coverage-improvement workflows for uncov, the low-coverage reporter for Vitest/Istanbul output.

plugins.name: upkeep-rs
plugins.description: Rust crate maintenance workflows for cargo-upkeep: dependency review, RustSec audits, quality scoring, and unsafe-code analysis.

plugins.name: repjan
plugins.description: Safe GitHub repository cleanup workflows for repjan: audit repos, review archive candidates, export evidence, and archive carefully.

plugins.name: lsm
plugins.description: Forensics and workflow skills for lsm, the local secrets manager.
